title: Confiscation of things seized
doc_html:
§60.  Confiscation of things seized

The Wildlife and Fisheries Commission shall adopt rules and regulations concerning disposition of all things seized and forfeited in the provisions of this Chapter.  

Acts 1981, No. 837, §1.
